name: Order Express - Phoenix Van Buren Check Cashing
description_short: Order Express is a multi-service financial company specializing in check cashing, money transfers, and bill payments across 25 states with 70+ branches.
description_long:
Order Express Inc. was founded in 1993 as a proudly Mexican company operating under US laws and statutes. The company was born to serve Latino immigrant communities, with its first branch established in Chicago, Illinois. Since then, it has grown to become a regulated entity operating in 25 states with over 70 company-owned branches and authorized agents as of January 2021.

The company's core service is money transfer, offered quickly and safely with Spanish-language support. Beyond remittances, Order Express offers check cashing, money orders, bill payment services, currency exchange, phone top-ups, bus passes, title loans, plane ticket sales, courier services, vehicle services, and Bitcoin ATM kiosks. Their service portfolio reflects a deliberate strategy to meet the comprehensive financial needs of underbanked immigrant communities.

Order Express distinguishes itself through bilingual service (English/Spanish), extended operating hours (9 AM to 7:30 PM on Fridays), high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 stars on Google), and a loyalty program. The company operates a physical branch network rather than purely digital channels, enabling in-person transactions for customers who prefer face-to-face service. Staff reviews emphasize friendliness and helpfulness.

As a check-cashing and money services company, Order Express fills gaps for unbanked and underbanked populations but does not offer traditional banking products like savings accounts or credit products. Customers should be aware that specific fee structures are not disclosed on the website, and the company's primary positioning is as a money services provider rather than a credit-building or lending institution.
address: 3555 W Van Buren St Suite 107, Phoenix, AZ 85009

company_info.headquarters: 3555 W Van Buren St Suite 107, Phoenix, AZ 85009

pros: Operates 70+ branches across 25 states with physical locations for in-person service
Bilingual (English/Spanish) customer service aligned with target demographic
Extended operating hours including Friday evenings (until 7:30 PM) and Sunday service
High customer satisfaction with 4.9-star Google rating and positive service reviews
Comprehensive service suite including check cashing, money transfer, bill payment, currency exchange, and title loans under one roof
Founded in 1993 with established reputation serving Latino immigrant communities
cons: Website does not disclose check cashing fees, money transfer rates, or other service costs
No online check cashing or digital-first services mentioned; primarily branch-dependent
Limited information about regulatory oversight, licensing, or FDIC insurance status on the website
Title loan services may carry high interest rates typical of collateral-based lending
No mention of credit building, financial counseling, or services beyond transactional money services
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked Spanish-speaking immigrants needing check cashing and money transfer services
Customers requiring multiple financial services (check cashing, bill payment, currency exchange) at a single physical location
Individuals seeking bilingual customer service and evening/weekend financial service access
diagnosis: Order Express is best suited for unbanked and underbanked populations, particularly Spanish-speaking immigrants, who need reliable check cashing, money transfer, and bill payment services with multilingual support and physical branch accessibility. The main caveat is that fee structures are not transparent on their website, and this is a transaction-focused service provider rather than a credit-building or lending institution.
